rows.label: tev074101_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev074101_SEL0011
rows.name:
Ask Non'barac about the
Growth's main base.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev074101_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev074101_SEL0021
rows.name:
Ask Non'barac if anything
is troubling her.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev074101_SEL0031
rows.name:
Ask Non'barac about the
fight with the Growth.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev074101_SEL1021
rows.name: Ask Non'barac about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev074101_MSG0001
rows.name:
Growth's home base seems
to be in Cauldros.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev074101_MSG0002
rows.name:
Sifting through the memories that run through
my veins, I do have a sense that most of
the weapons we made were sent north.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev074101_MSG0003
rows.name:
Those weapons alone would make for
quite an impressive concentration of
artillery, so watch out for that.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev074101_MSG0004
rows.name:
I also suspect you'll be facing
defenses far beyond anything
you've seen in this area.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev074101_MSG0009
rows.name:
The miranium shortage is a serious problem, but
an entirely preventable one caused by the
inefficient way you humans are exploring Mira.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev074101_MSG0010
rows.name:
After all, outside of major missions, the
exploration is being conducted by individual
teams acting on their own initiative, is it not?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev074101_MSG0011
rows.name:
Unlike us, you don't have an
Ovah to regulate your efforts.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev074101_MSG0012
rows.name:
Wouldn't it make more sense to expand
FrontierNet in a carefully planned fashion,
moving each BLADE like a piece on a map?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev074101_MSG0013
rows.name:
If you leave the planning to me, I
can promise that your efforts will
be 3.68 times more efficient![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev074101_MSG0018
rows.name:
Several of the Orphe Parfait armaments
employ parts that I've developed.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev074101_MSG0019
rows.name:
Have they served you well in
your fight with the Growth?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev074101_MSG0020
rows.name:
I have made a number of friends in this city, and
take pride in having been able to offer them
higher-quality items than I did to the Growth.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev074101_MSG0021
rows.name: What do you think? Were they of use?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev074101_MSG0022
rows.name:
If so, I hope you will continue to
use them—with my deep appreciation—to
maintain a lasting peace.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev074101_MSG1001
rows.name:
After what happened, I had a long
conversation with a Pathfinder.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev074101_MSG1002
rows.name:
He spoke of having to traverse
unimaginably dangerous areas in
order to install data probes.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev074101_MSG1003
rows.name:
Apparently he's had to install them on
sheer cliffs, in indigen nests, and even
at the heart of Growth fortresses![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev074101_MSG1004
rows.name:
With the pace at which you've been
installing them lately, I had assumed
it was a much simpler task.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev074101_MSG1005
rows.name:
You humans certainly are incredible
creatures. Please keep installing those
probes and bringing me their miranium![ST:wait ]
